data.author: jilinzhouas

[#75] Fix a bug in function getTriggerModeInt() (#77)

- Return Invalid mode if the input mode_str is undefined.
- It returned an underfined mode (local variable) before in this case

data.author: gbartyzel
data.message: Added features required to run USB cameras (#54)

data.author: vbrebion
data.message:
Fixed 'escalating to SIGTERM' when closing (#22)

The issue was comming from the signal handler for the SIGINT event.
Indeed, it was always activated, and thus would catch our ctrl+C presses while not exiting the application.
Made it enabled only for the few lines where it is needed, and re-enabled the default one just after to make the application exit correctly

data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Fix 32-bit compiles

There is no such thing as x86_32 architecture. Most Linux distros report i386 for 32-bit machines.
